=========================================================================
 OptimalFit - Android build info
=========================================================================
Build date      : 2026-07-08 (rebuilt by Builder-8, P2-12 — physique photo
                  analysis: new js/physique.js (Body-tab analyze/save UI),
                  storage.js physique record type + clamps, targets-engine
                  estimated-bodyFat integration, goals/coach/insights physique
                  wiring, bodyscan icon, demo physique analyses, sw v10 [no-op'd
                  in native]; previous rebuild by Builder-7, P2-11 strength;
                  earlier Builder-6 P2-9 food photo, Fixer-3 P2-7 splash,
                  iOS-1 P2-4 icons; original build by Android-1, P2-3)

App identity
  applicationId : com.optimalfit.app
  versionCode   : 1
  versionName   : 1.0.0
  label         : OptimalFit

SDK levels (from native/android/variables.gradle - Capacitor 8.4.1 template)
  minSdk        : 24  (Android 7.0)
  targetSdk     : 36
  compileSdk    : 36  (platformBuildVersionName 16)

Toolchain
  JDK           : Temurin 21.0.11+10 (C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.11.10-hotspot)
                  NOTE: task spec said JDK 17, but Capacitor 8 generates
                  sourceCompatibility Java 21 in capacitor.build.gradle
                  (regenerated on every cap sync), so JDK 21 is required.
  Android SDK   : C:\Android (cmdline-tools 11076708, platform-tools 37.0.0,
                  platforms;android-36, build-tools;36.0.0)
  Gradle        : 8.14.3 (wrapper) / AGP 8.13.0
  Node          : v24.18.0 (C:\Program Files\nodejs)

Web snapshot built (webDir = native/www, mirrored from app/)
  Synced        : 2026-07-08 via `npm run sync` (Builder-8, P2-12)
  Snapshot      : everything above PLUS the P2-12 physique-analysis feature
                  (NEW js/physique.js Body-tab analyze/save UI; storage.js
                  physique record type + import clamps/enums; targets-engine
                  effectiveBodyFat + estimated-bodyFat echo; goals.js/coach.js
                  physique coach context; insights.js Physique card; icons.js
                  bodyscan icon; demo.js physique analyses on a 3rd seeded
                  stream; index.html body-photo-area + physique-modal;
                  css/style.css physique styles). 33 files; www/sw.js is the
                  intentional self-unregistering no-op (by design; real
                  app/sw.js is at VERSION v10).

Launcher icons (P2-4, iOS-1): default Capacitor robot REPLACED with the
  OptimalFit brand icon (violet->cyan gradient + white dumbbell) in all
  mipmap densities incl. adaptive foreground + solid #8B5CF6 adaptive
  background color; unreferenced robot vector XMLs (drawable/,
  drawable-v24/) removed. Regenerate: python native\scripts\gen_native_icons.py

Splash screens (P2-7, Fixer-3): default gray Capacitor splash REPLACED with
  the brand splash (deep #0a0e17 background, violet->cyan gradient dumbbell
  mark centered at ~25% width) in all 11 drawable*/splash.png densities
  (default + land/port x mdpi..xxxhdpi, template sizes kept) and the iOS
  Splash.imageset (3x 2732x2732). Regenerate: python native\scripts\gen_native_splash.py

Artifacts (SHA-256) — rebuilt 2026-07-08 with the P2-12 physique feature,
  same versionCode 1 (nothing was uploaded to Play yet, so no bump needed)
  OptimalFit-debug.apk    4,245,986 B  9FCF809639BA65CAC119C60C4BB16E37EA6F9779615F425B21E1C8D229B4440E
                          (debug-signed with the standard Android debug key)
  OptimalFit-release.apk  3,238,632 B  91C34840ED11C8F54AD47E89EC92877D34E13B2BEF4BFA5A5EC6C1C1ED76882F
                          (signed: CN=OptimalFit, SHA-256 cert digest
                           7e4cb149115790dc9973af7781834f09d6e028b1211777c73a6df5b5ccfcd9e1)
  OptimalFit-release.aab  3,075,073 B  2DAA307A4309BBE4483D08D72582F10BFB21654736BB94B4A24F09D8525E6466
                          (jarsigner: "jar verified" - upload THIS to Google Play)

Verification performed (re-run after the P2-12 rebuild)
  - apksigner verify --print-certs on release APK: OK, cert digest matches
    the original 7e4cb1...d9e1 (same keystore)
  - jarsigner -verify on AAB: jar verified
  - assets/public/js/physique.js (plus strength-engine.js, exercise.js and
    demo.js) inside the release APK are byte-identical to their app/js
    versions; assets/public/sw.js is the intentional no-op (the bumped v10
    sw.js applies to the browser/PWA build only)
  - (QA-6 re-verified 2026-07-08: all 3 artifact SHA-256 match the hashes
    above; physique.js byte-identical across native www/iOS/Android copies)
  - earlier P2-9/P2-7 checks (food-photo.js, brand splash at 11 configs,
    storage.js clamps, "this device" copy) untouched by this rebuild

Rebuild recipe (after any app/ change - e.g. next release):
  1. Bump versionCode (+1) and versionName in
     native\android\app\build.gradle (Play rejects reused versionCodes)
  2. In PowerShell:
       $env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.11.10-hotspot"
       $env:PATH = "$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs;$env:PATH"
       $env:GRADLE_OPTS = "-Djavax.net.ssl.trustStoreType=Windows-ROOT"
       cd C:\Users\kjets\optimal-fit\native
       npm run sync
       cd android
       .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug bundleRelease assembleRelease
  3. Artifacts appear under native\android\app\build\outputs\
     (apk\debug, apk\release, bundle\release) - copy to dist\
  Signing is automatic: app\build.gradle reads dist\keystore.properties.
  (GRADLE_OPTS line is needed because this machine's network intercepts
   TLS; the Windows cert store trusts it, the JDK's bundled one doesn't.)
=========================================================================
